titles.title: Present Your Body as a Living Sacrifice

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Present your body as a living sacrifice It's your reasonable service For you've been bought with a price

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Present your body as a living sacrifice It's your reasonable service For you've been bought with a price

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The precious blood of Jesus Of the sinless spotless Lamb Shed for you and I fallen man How He loved us with a love Even before this world began Considered you and I In his redemption plan How we should love him And be prisoners of his word Bound by the chains Of love divine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The whole creation groaneth And travaileth until now For the manifestation of the sons of God He's rent the veil of vain tradition Brought his image in plain view Now veils his glory In oddballs like me and you Now we despise Satan's Eden Die to ourselves day by day Perfect faith is the victory We must attain

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: A servant at suppertime Came with the secrets In God's mind Proclaimed our liberty Bringing many sons to glory How we tore our filthy rags In exchange for robes so clean and white To sit in God's presence Taking our place in His plan How we should be thankful He has chosen you and me We are the reason of His death We are his victory
